current_phase: Phase 6 - safe incident records, retention controls, and deterministic notification simulation complete
implemented_features: typed versioned incident records, summaries, evidence references, target references, timelines, outcomes, and store metadata
explicit incident lifecycle transition allowlist with closed and manual-intervention protections
deterministic exact-scope correlation and canonical duplicate references
sanitized-content checksum validation and chronological unique event enforcement
temporary-root-confined atomic local JSON incident store
deterministic retention preview and explicit temporary-fixture removal simulation
fixed notification provider capabilities and duplicate-safe registry
Telegram, email, SMS, webhook, and local deterministic delivery simulations
severity, event, status, and escalation notification routing
allowlisted notification templates with safe rendering, redaction, escaping, bounds, and visible truncation
exact duplicate-alert suppression, deterministic cooldowns, and finite attempt budgets
typed route, suppression, attempt, delivery, batch, and audit records
Phase 6 inspection, rendering, preview, and simulation CLI commands
local_store_features: path traversal and symlink escape rejected
atomic JSON writes within the validated root
retention_features: maximum age, record count, and total bytes modeling
unresolved, manual-intervention, severity, and latest-version protections
template_features: unknown variable, attribute access, indexing, conversion, and filter rejection
message length limits and visible truncation
no evidence object rendering or secret resolution
suppression_features: severity escalation override by explicit policy
deterministic cooldown and next eligible timestamp

eval, exec, pickle, dynamic plugins, background delivery loops, or real-time sleeps
